TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Cameron Bairstow hya'ga NBA pgnaw' mari' misuw qaniy, qutux sa pzyang pkaki' tpucing tay kska. kawas tay 1990, ryax sa tay 7 nqu tay 12, Cameron Bairstow, squliq na p'unro. aring raran hiya ga tecyugan na laqi. pqwasan biru nya ga Runcorn State High School. 2008 kawas tmasot mqbaq biru Anglican Church Grammar School. Cameron Bairstow na yaba yaya ga pkita qsinu nbu na sinsiy ru pcbaq biru sinsiy. Cameron Bairstow 2009 kawas ru 2010 kawas sakang' Australian Institute of Sport maki kanbela. mincyogun nya(qnxan) kinblayqan pincyuwagan sa qnxan niya' pspngan mari sa may yugal yacing cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: ʦ~ʨameron βairs~ɕtow ħjaʔɣa nβa pɣnawʔ mariʔ mis~ɕuw qanij, qutux s~ɕa pzjaŋ pkakiʔ tpuʦ~ʨiŋ taj ks~ɕka. kawas~ɕ taj ****, rjax s~ɕa taj * nqu taj **, ʦ~ʨameron βairs~ɕtow, s~ɕquliq na pʔunro. ariŋ raran ħija ɣa teʦ~ʨjuɣan na laqi. pqwas~ɕan βiru nja ɣa runʦ~ʨorn s~ɕtate ħiɣħ s~ɕʦ~ʨħool. **** kawas~ɕ tmas~ɕot mqβaq βiru aŋliʦ~ʨan ʦ~ʨħurʦ~ʨħ ɣrammar s~ɕʦ~ʨħool. ʦ~ʨameron βairs~ɕtow na jaβa jaja ɣa pkita qs~ɕinu nβu na s~ɕins~ɕij ru pʦ~ʨβaq βiru s~ɕins~ɕij. ʦ~ʨameron βairs~ɕtow **** kawas~ɕ ru **** kawas~ɕ s~ɕakaŋʔ aus~ɕtralian ins~ɕtitute o* s~ɕport maki kanβela. minʦ~ʨjoɣun nja(qnxan) kinβlajqan pinʦ~ʨjuwaɣan s~ɕa qnxan nijaʔ ps~ɕpŋan mari s~ɕa maj juɣal jaʦ~ʨiŋ ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* national βas~ɕketβall as~ɕs~ɕoʦ~ʨiation plajers~ɕ
S.FORM: Cameron Bairstow hya'ga NBA pgnaw' mari' misuw qaniy, qutux sa pzyang pkaki' tpucing tay kska. kawas tay 1990, ryax sa tay 7 nqu tay 12, Cameron Bairstow, squliq na p'unro. aring raran hiya ga tecyugan na laqi. pqwasan biru nya ga Runcorn State High School. 2008 kawas tmasot mqbaq biru Anglican Church Grammar School. Cameron Bairstow na yaba yaya ga pkita qsinu nbu na sinsiy ru pcbaq biru sinsiy. Cameron Bairstow 2009 kawas ru 2010 kawas sakang' Australian Institute of Sport maki kanbela. mincyogun nya(qnxan) kinblayqan pincyuwagan sa qnxan niya' pspngan mari sa may yugal yacing cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: ʦ~ʨameron βairs~ɕtow ħjaʔɣa nβa pɣnawʔ mariʔ mis~ɕuw qanij, qutux s~ɕa pzjaŋ pkakiʔ tpuʦ~ʨiŋ taj ks~ɕka. kawas~ɕ taj ****, rjax s~ɕa taj * nqu taj **, ʦ~ʨameron βairs~ɕtow, s~ɕquliq na pʔunro. ariŋ raran ħija ɣa teʦ~ʨjuɣan na laqi. pqwas~ɕan βiru nja ɣa runʦ~ʨorn s~ɕtate ħiɣħ s~ɕʦ~ʨħool. **** kawas~ɕ tmas~ɕot mqβaq βiru aŋliʦ~ʨan ʦ~ʨħurʦ~ʨħ ɣrammar s~ɕʦ~ʨħool. ʦ~ʨameron βairs~ɕtow na jaβa jaja ɣa pkita qs~ɕinu nβu na s~ɕins~ɕij ru pʦ~ʨβaq βiru s~ɕins~ɕij. ʦ~ʨameron βairs~ɕtow **** kawas~ɕ ru **** kawas~ɕ s~ɕakaŋʔ aus~ɕtralian ins~ɕtitute o* s~ɕport maki kanβela. minʦ~ʨjoɣun nja(qnxan) kinβlajqan pinʦ~ʨjuwaɣan s~ɕa qnxan nijaʔ ps~ɕpŋan mari s~ɕa maj juɣal jaʦ~ʨiŋ ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* national βas~ɕketβall as~ɕs~ɕoʦ~ʨiation plajers~ɕ
